name: untappd-mcp
description: Search Untappd beers, breweries, and venues; read profiles, check-ins, wishlists, and your friend feed; and post check-ins, toasts, and comments to your account

untappd_username.title: Untappd Username
untappd_username.description: Your Untappd username (or the email you log in with).

untappd_password.title: Untappd Password
untappd_password.description: Your Untappd account password. Used only to log in via the mobile xauth endpoint; never stored server-side.

untappd_client_id.title: Untappd Client ID
untappd_client_id.description: The Untappd mobile app client id. See the README for how to obtain it by intercepting the app's traffic.

untappd_client_secret.title: Untappd Client Secret
untappd_client_secret.description: The Untappd mobile app client secret (obtained the same way as the client id).

tools.name: untappd_search_beer
tools.description: Search Untappd for beers by name

tools.name: untappd_beer_info
tools.description: Get full detail for a beer by its bid

tools.name: untappd_beer_activity
tools.description: Get recent public check-ins for a beer

tools.name: untappd_search_brewery
tools.description: Search Untappd for breweries by name

tools.name: untappd_brewery_info
tools.description: Get full detail for a brewery by id

tools.name: untappd_brewery_beers
tools.description: Get a brewery's beer list

tools.name: untappd_search_venue
tools.description: Search Untappd for venues by name

tools.name: untappd_venue_info
tools.description: Get full detail for a venue by id

tools.name: untappd_venue_activity
tools.description: Get recent check-ins at a venue

tools.name: untappd_user_info
tools.description: Get an Untappd user's profile

tools.name: untappd_user_checkins
tools.description: Get a user's recent check-ins

tools.name: untappd_user_wishlist
tools.description: Get a user's wishlist beers

tools.name: untappd_user_beers
tools.description: Get a user's distinct (unique) beers

tools.name: untappd_user_badges
tools.description: Get a user's earned badges

tools.name: untappd_user_friends
tools.description: Get a user's friend list

tools.name: untappd_activity_feed
tools.description: Get your friend activity feed

tools.name: untappd_checkin_info
tools.description: Get full detail for a single check-in

tools.name: untappd_trending
tools.description: Get trending beers (macro and micro)

tools.name: untappd_notifications
tools.description: Get your Untappd notifications

tools.name: untappd_local_checkins
tools.description: Get nearby check-ins by lat/lng

tools.name: untappd_toast
tools.description: Toast (like) a check-in on your account (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_add_comment
tools.description: Comment on a check-in from your account (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_delete_comment
tools.description: Delete one of your comments (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_checkin
tools.description: Post a new beer check-in, optionally with a photo (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_delete_checkin
tools.description: Delete one of your check-ins (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_wishlist_add
tools.description: Add a beer to your wishlist (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_wishlist_remove
tools.description: Remove a beer from your wishlist (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify Untappd connectivity and login

tools.name: untappd_pending_friends
tools.description: Get your incoming friend requests

tools.name: untappd_user_venues
tools.description: Get venues a user has checked in at

tools.name: untappd_venue_by_foursquare
tools.description: Look up an Untappd venue by Foursquare id

tools.name: untappd_resolve
tools.description: Resolve an untappd.com URL to its entity + id

tools.name: untappd_open_url
tools.description: Resolve an untappd.com URL and fetch its detail

tools.name: untappd_add_friend
tools.description: Send a friend request (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_accept_friend
tools.description: Accept an incoming friend request (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_reject_friend
tools.description: Reject an incoming friend request (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_remove_friend
tools.description: Remove a friend or cancel a sent request (confirm-gated)

tools.name: untappd_sync_checkins
tools.description: Sync a user's detailed check-ins into the cache (incremental + resumable backfill; force_backfill to reset)

tools.name: untappd_sync_user_beers
tools.description: Sync a user's complete distinct-beers list into the cache (cheapest full has-had coverage; resumable)

tools.name: untappd_cache_has_had
tools.description: Check if a user has had a beer, from the cache — both sources (no API call)

tools.name: untappd_cache_has_had_many
tools.description: Batch had/not-had for many beer ids, from the cache (no API call)

tools.name: untappd_cache_not_had
tools.description: From a list of beer ids, return the ones a user has NOT had (no API call)

tools.name: untappd_cache_query
tools.description: Query cached check-ins by brewery, style, rating, venue, or date (no API call)

tools.name: untappd_top_not_had
tools.description: From a list of beer ids, the top N a user has NOT had, ranked by rating, with a style filter
